hero.title: Your Knowledge,
hero.subtitle: NexusBrain is the modern Logseq alternative. Organize your thoughts in blocks, discover hidden connections with local AI, and keep full control over your data.

features.title: Powerful Features for Power Users
features.subtitle: NexusBrain combines the best concepts of networked thinking with state-of-the-art technology.
features.f1_desc: A Logseq-like outliner with infinite nesting. Focus on individual blocks and organize your knowledge granularly.
features.f2_desc: Link pages with `[[Page]]` and reference blocks with `((block))`. Build a web of information that grows with you.
features.f3_desc: Interactive visual map of all connections. Navigate intuitively through your knowledge web and discover clusters.
features.f4_desc: Sync your data securely via WebDAV or Git with End-to-End Encryption. Your data stays private and secure.
features.f5_desc: Integrated PDF reader with deep links. Link your notes directly to specific parts of your PDF documents.
features.f6_desc: Use multiple windows on desktop and protect your data on mobile with Fingerprint or FaceID.

ai.title: More than just a notebook:
ai.desc: NexusBrain uses local AI to bring your knowledge to life. No data transfer to the cloud, 100% privacy.
ai.s1_desc: Find content based on meaning, not just exact keywords. "Search for project ideas" also finds "Inspiration for new apps".
ai.s2_desc: The AI automatically suggests tags and categories based on your content.
ai.s3_desc: Automatically discover links to other pages you might have forgotten while writing.

download.title: Ready for NexusBrain?
download.subtitle: Whether on web, desktop, or mobile – NexusBrain is wherever you want to capture your thoughts.

footer.desc: Your Second Brain – Secure, Local, Intelligent.
